20242024T09532.objet_clair: Roadway works to better manage rainwater on major street works.
20242024T09532.quoi_concretement: Companies work on Paris streets to install water-collection and drainage systems. The aim is to modernise the network during major roadway projects.
20242024T09532.pourquoi_ca_compte: Helps prevent street flooding and better protects the environment during storms.

20242024T09531.objet_clair: Roadway works to improve rainwater management in Paris.
20242024T09531.quoi_concretement: This contract funds road fit-outs to ease drainage and treatment of rainwater. Several companies work in different sectors of the capital to adapt the city to the climate.
20242024T09531.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better water management cuts the risk of sewer overload and Seine pollution.

20242024T11073.objet_clair: Renovation of pumping and local-management stations on the sewer network.
20242024T11073.quoi_concretement: Technicians renovate the technical installations that move waste water and stormwater. These stations are essential for the proper running of the city's underground network.
20242024T11073.pourquoi_ca_compte: A modern drainage network ensures a clean city and prevents odour issues or major breakdowns.

20242024T00128.objet_clair: Schoolyard fit-outs in the central districts and the 9th, 10th, 11th and 12th.
20242024T00128.quoi_concretement: The company Terideal converts school and college yards by adding vegetation and natural materials. The works create more pleasant, less hot spaces for pupils.
20242024T00128.pourquoi_ca_compte: Children enjoy cooler summer yards and new, more natural play spaces.

20242024T00122.objet_clair: Planted Oasis schoolyards in several Left Bank and West-Paris districts.
20242024T00122.quoi_concretement: Eiffage Route converts tarmacked schoolyards into green spaces with permeable floors. The project covers the 5th, 6th, 7th and 13th to 17th districts.
20242024T00122.pourquoi_ca_compte: These yards serve as cool refuges for school children and area residents during heatwaves.

20242024T00109.objet_clair: Planted schoolyard fit-outs in the 18th, 19th and 20th districts.
20242024T00109.quoi_concretement: Conversion works are carried out at north-east Paris schools to replace tarmac with soil and plants. The aim is to better absorb water and refresh the air.
20242024T00109.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves pupils' setting and helps the city adapt to climate change.

20242024T10161.objet_clair: Works on gas heating systems and steam stations in municipal buildings.
20242024T10161.quoi_concretement: Several companies renovate or install boilers and district-heating equipment. The works cover many districts, from the 1st to the 9th and the 14th to the 18th.
20242024T10161.pourquoi_ca_compte: Modern installations ensure efficient, less polluting heating in schools, town halls and gymnasiums.

20242024T10170.objet_clair: Heating-installation maintenance and repair in public buildings of various districts.
20242024T10170.quoi_concretement: This contract ensures the proper running of gas boilers and district heating in the 5th, 10th, 11th, 12th, 13th, 19th and 20th districts. Technicians provide routine maintenance and breakdown repairs.
20242024T10170.pourquoi_ca_compte: Regular maintenance prevents heating failures in winter at public services and schools.

20242024F10822.objet_clair: Fuel and payment-card purchases for City vehicles.
20242024F10822.quoi_concretement: Several suppliers deliver petrol and diesel to power municipal cars, trucks and works machines. Specific payment cards let staff fill up directly at petrol stations.
20242024F10822.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the daily running of mobile public services such as cleanliness or emergency technical interventions.

20242024S07503.quoi_concretement: Sports leaders work in Paris schools to introduce children to classic disciplines. These activities take place during school time or evening after-school sessions.
20242024S07503.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets Paris school children practise regular, varied physical activity for free.

20232023T11505.objet_clair: Tarmac renovation on Paris streets, excluding the ring road.
20232023T11505.quoi_concretement: The company Jean Lefebvre refurbishes damaged roadways by laying new tarmac. The works remove potholes and smooth the road to improve traffic comfort.
20232023T11505.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures safer, quieter roads for drivers, cyclists and residents.

20242024S05936.objet_clair: Educational and medical support for Child Welfare children.
20242024S05936.quoi_concretement: Educators and carers work with minors protected by the City. They provide daily follow-up for their mental and physical health and for their social and school integration.
20242024S05936.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides essential support to the most vulnerable children to help them build a stable future.

20242024F03550.objet_clair: Safety-equipment purchases to protect municipal staff at work.
20242024F03550.quoi_concretement: The City buys helmets, glasses, hearing protection and tough work clothes. This equipment goes to technical staff working on sites or in municipal workshops.

20242024T10186.objet_clair: Ventilation maintenance in public buildings of east Paris.
20242024T10186.quoi_concretement: Technicians check and repair ventilation installations in the central and eastern districts (5th to 13th, 19th and 20th). Covers schools, town halls and gymnasiums in these areas.
20242024T10186.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures healthy, renewed air for users and staff in public-welcome venues.

20242024T10178.objet_clair: Ventilation maintenance in public buildings of west and south Paris.
20242024T10178.quoi_concretement: This contract covers maintenance of air-renewal systems for the 1st to 9th and 14th to 18th districts. Teams ensure proper running of fans and filters.
20242024T10178.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures good indoor air quality in municipal facilities visited by Parisians.

20242024T10194.objet_clair: Heating and cooling-system modernisation to save energy.
20242024T10194.quoi_concretement: Companies replace old boilers or air-conditioning units with greener models in City buildings. The works include pipework changes to optimise heat distribution.
20242024T10194.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts the City's energy use and actively contributes to fighting climate change.

20242024F00365.objet_clair: Computer and IT-equipment purchases for City staff.
20242024F00365.quoi_concretement: The City buys desktops, laptops and accessories to equip its administrative services. The supplier delivers and installs this equipment based on department needs.

20242024T10201.objet_clair: Safety and surveillance system installation in municipal buildings.
20242024T10201.quoi_concretement: Companies install cameras, alarms and access controls in town halls, schools or gymnasiums. The aim is to protect public venues from intrusion or damage.
20242024T10201.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures user and staff safety in venues welcoming the public in Paris.

20242024S03869.objet_clair: Restoration of paintings and wall murals owned by the City of Paris.
20242024S03869.quoi_concretement: Specialists clean, repair and conserve old artworks. Covers paintings on canvas or walls in churches or historic buildings.
20242024S03869.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the capital's artistic and historic heritage for future generations.

20242024T03610.objet_clair: Installation and maintenance of blinds and shutters in City buildings.
20242024T03610.quoi_concretement: Craftspeople install new shutters or blinds and repair broken ones in schools, day-cares and municipal offices. Helps regulate light and heat indoors.
20242024T03610.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves children's and users' thermal comfort, especially during heatwaves.

20242024S02371.objet_clair: Asbestos and lead detection in municipal buildings.
20242024S02371.quoi_concretement: Experts take samples to detect hazardous materials such as asbestos or lead. These diagnostics are mandatory before launching renovation works.
20242024S02371.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures workers' and occupants' health by avoiding exposure to toxic substances.

20232023F11627.objet_clair: Lease of a natural-gas filling station for City vehicles.
20232023F11627.quoi_concretement: The City leases a compressed-natural-gas filling installation at a municipal garage in Ivry. Lets refuse trucks and other gas-powered service vehicles refuel.
20232023F11627.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts air pollution by using less polluting fuels for urban services.

20242024T10078.objet_clair: Renovation works on small foot-accessible sewer pipework.
20242024T10078.quoi_concretement: Workers go down into the sewers to consolidate and repair the walls of small underground galleries. These interventions prevent leaks and surface roadway collapses.
20242024T10078.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures proper waste-water drainage and prevents street-subsidence risks.

20242024F03551.objet_clair: Respiratory-protection mask purchases for municipal staff.
20242024F03551.quoi_concretement: The City orders stocks of disposable masks and reusable half-masks. This equipment protects staff exposed to dust or chemicals during their missions.

20242024T10082.objet_clair: Renovation of major Paris sewers and drainage tunnels.
20242024T10082.quoi_concretement: Specialist companies work in the underground galleries to repair walls and structures. The aim is to consolidate the waste-water network to prevent leaks or collapses.
20242024T10082.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures proper waste-water drainage and protects Paris-street foundations.

20232023T11506.objet_clair: New tarmac on the ring road, the riverbanks and tunnels.
20232023T11506.quoi_concretement: Eiffage refurbishes the roadway on the capital's major routes. The works strip the old surfacing and lay new tarmac to ensure smooth, safe driving.
20232023T11506.pourquoi_ca_compte: A road in good condition reduces rolling noise and limits pothole-related accident risks.

20242024F10043.objet_clair: New-book purchases for Paris municipal libraries.
20242024F10043.quoi_concretement: Several suppliers regularly deliver novels, comics and essays to the city's libraries. This contract renews the collections available for public lending.
20242024F10043.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets Parisians access the latest literary releases for free near home.

20242024S00742.quoi_concretement: Social workers support homeless or highly precarious people. They help them regain social stability and build a professional project to escape exclusion.
20242024S00742.pourquoi_ca_compte: Helps the most vulnerable regain a place in society and stable housing.

20232023F11629.objet_clair: Natural-gas refilling station installation for municipal vehicles.
20232023F11629.quoi_concretement: GNVERT installs and runs a gas filling station at the Romainville garage. Supplies trucks and city vehicles running on compressed natural gas.
20232023F11629.pourquoi_ca_compte: Using gas cuts air pollution from city technical-service travel.

20242024S07554.objet_clair: Sports and culture workshops for Paris school children.
20242024S07554.quoi_concretement: Sports leaders and educators work in primary schools during or after class. They offer physical and artistic activities to support children's development.
20242024S07554.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets all children access quality sports and culture activities for free.

20242024S00737.objet_clair: Return-to-work support for people with health issues.
20242024S00737.quoi_concretement: Specialised structures help welfare-benefit recipients with health concerns return to work. Support is adapted to their physical or psychological abilities.
20242024S00737.pourquoi_ca_compte: An essential support to prevent isolation of sick or disabled people facing financial difficulty.

20232023S11534.objet_clair: Bespoke fit-out of City of Paris vans and utility vehicles.
20232023S11534.quoi_concretement: Durisotti converts standard vehicles into utility vehicles suited to staff needs (shelves, protections, storage). These vehicles transport equipment for city upkeep.

20242023S12858.objet_clair: Operation of the City of Paris funeral services.
20242023S12858.quoi_concretement: The City entrusts a public company with running its municipal funeral services. Includes funeral organisation, transport of the deceased and family welcome at the dedicated facilities.
20242023S12858.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides Parisians with quality public funeral services at controlled rates during difficult moments.

20232023F11628.objet_clair: Natural-gas supply for municipal vehicles at the Aubervilliers garage.
20232023F11628.quoi_concretement: TotalEnergies supplies compressed natural gas to power City trucks and vehicles. The contract also covers maintenance of the filling station at the Aubervilliers municipal garage.
20232023F11628.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets cleanliness and technical-service trucks run on cleaner energy than diesel.

20242024T10150.objet_clair: Temperature-sensor installation in City of Paris buildings.
20242024T10150.quoi_concretement: Companies will install connected temperature probes in schools, town halls and municipal offices. The tools track heat in real time to better adjust heating.
20242024T10150.pourquoi_ca_compte: The aim is to reduce energy waste and improve user comfort while cutting the City's bill.

20242024S05202.objet_clair: Maintenance of safety and surveillance systems in municipal buildings.
20242024S05202.quoi_concretement: This contract covers maintenance of alarms, surveillance cameras and access controls in Paris public venues. Technicians intervene to prevent breakdowns or repair faulty equipment.
20242024S05202.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures protection of public facilities and safety of people visiting City buildings.

20242024T01869.objet_clair: Heating, ventilation and air-conditioning works in City facilities.
20242024T01869.quoi_concretement: Several companies renovate or install heating and ventilation systems. These works cover the entire municipal building stock such as schools, gymnasiums or town halls.
20242024T01869.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures suitable temperature and good air quality in venues welcoming the public year-round.

20242024S10723.objet_clair: Physical accompaniment of Child Welfare children.
20242024S10723.quoi_concretement: Professionals provide safe transport and support of protected minors during their journeys. Covers trips to school, medical appointments and family visits.
20242024S10723.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the safety and well-being of the most vulnerable children during their daily journeys.

20242024S00748.objet_clair: Return-to-work support for RSA recipients enrolled for over 10 years.
20242024S00748.quoi_concretement: Specialised advisers support Parisians far from work for a very long time. They offer personalised follow-up to remove social barriers and help return to lasting professional activity.
20242024S00748.pourquoi_ca_compte: Fights long-term exclusion by offering reinforced support to the most socially vulnerable people.

20242024S00732.objet_clair: Intensive return-to-work support for new RSA recipients.
20242024S00732.quoi_concretement: This service offers very regular follow-up to people who just entered the RSA scheme. The idea is to act fast in the first year to encourage rapid return to activity and prevent settling into precariousness.
20242024S00732.pourquoi_ca_compte: Speeds return to work to prevent new recipients drifting away from the labour market long-term.

20242024F11808.objet_clair: Office-desk and modular-furniture purchases for City services.
20242024F11808.quoi_concretement: The City buys desks, tables and storage to equip its administrative premises. EOL delivers and installs this standard or modular furniture based on municipal-staff needs.

20242024S06943.objet_clair: Advice and support for managing City of Paris IT projects.
20242024S06943.quoi_concretement: External experts help the town hall define its digital needs and follow the development of its software or websites. They liaise between City services and technical providers.
20242024S06943.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the City's digital tools work well and meet user needs.

20232024S01606.objet_clair: Operation of Les Trois Baudets and FGO-Barbara performance venues.
20232024S01606.quoi_concretement: Madline programmes concerts, welcomes artists and manages audiences at these two Paris cultural venues. Also handles maintenance and daily activity at the sites.
20232024S01606.pourquoi_ca_compte: Sustains the local music scene and provides accessible cultural offerings to Parisians in the 18th district.

20242024S11872.objet_clair: Verification of the accuracy of Paris street and pavement plans.
20242024S11872.quoi_concretement: Avineon checks that the digital maps of the Paris road network are accurate. It verifies the position of features (poles, pavements, roadway) so the City has reliable plans for future works.
20242024S11872.pourquoi_ca_compte: Accurate plans let works be better planned and prevent errors during street projects.

20242024T04870.objet_clair: Automatic-irrigation installation and renovation in east-Paris parks.
20242024T04870.quoi_concretement: The company installs automatic-irrigation systems in the green spaces of the 5th, 11th, 12th, 13th and 20th districts. Includes pipework, programmers and fountain installation.
20242024T04870.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures vegetation survives heatwaves while optimising water use.

20242024T04860.objet_clair: Automatic-irrigation works for parks in central and west Paris.
20242024T04860.quoi_concretement: Irrigation and fountain systems are installed or repaired in the central gardens and the 6th, 7th, 14th, 15th and 16th districts. The aim is to automate plant maintenance.
20242024T04860.pourquoi_ca_compte: Maintains coolness and greenery in dense areas, especially during summer.

20242024T04790.quoi_concretement: This works site covers the 8th, 9th, 10th, 17th, 18th and 19th districts. The company installs equipment to water parks more effectively and manage water points and fountains.
20242024T04790.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the city's plant heritage and ensures public fountains run properly.

20242024F01364.objet_clair: Tableware and kitchen-utensil purchases for Paris day-cares.
20242024F01364.quoi_concretement: The City orders plates, glasses, cutlery and kitchen tools suited to toddlers. This equipment goes to the early-childhood facilities run by the town hall.
20242024F01364.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures children have safe, suitable, regularly renewed mealtime equipment in day-cares.

20242024T11532.objet_clair: Installation of charging stations for electric vehicles.
20242024T11532.quoi_concretement: Technicians install electric charging stations at city public facilities. This works site covers the project's first geographic batch.
20242024T11532.pourquoi_ca_compte: Eases the transition to electric vehicles for users and municipal services.

20242024T11533.objet_clair: Charging-station installation in several districts and neighbouring departments.
20242024T11533.quoi_concretement: Installation of charging points for electric cars in the 8th, 11th, 16th to 20th districts and in the suburbs. The company carries out the connection and commissioning works.
20242024T11533.pourquoi_ca_compte: Extends the charging network to encourage less polluting mobility.

20242024S08028.objet_clair: Operation of a municipal day-care on Boulevard Lefebvre in the 15th district.
20242024S08028.quoi_concretement: A private operator runs the daily operation of an early-childhood facility. Includes child supervision, meals and premises upkeep.
20242024S08028.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures quality day-care places for the area's young children.

20242024T03119.objet_clair: Repair and reinforcement of an arch of Pont de Sully.
20242024T03119.quoi_concretement: Consolidation works on the bridge's stone and metal structure to ensure its strength. Workers intervene directly on arch number 2 crossing the Seine.
20242024T03119.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures passer-by safety and the longevity of this Paris historic heritage.

20242024T03749.objet_clair: Full renovation of Château-Landon Swimming Pool in the 10th district.
20242024T03749.quoi_concretement: Modernisation of pools, changing rooms and water-treatment systems. The works site improves swimmer comfort and the building's energy efficiency.
20242024T03749.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a modern, greener sports facility accessible to area residents.

20242024S10725.objet_clair: Accompanying Child Welfare children during their journeys.
20242024S10725.quoi_concretement: Professionals physically accompany children and young people followed by the city during their daily or specific journeys. Ensures their safety and presence at important appointments.
20242024S10725.pourquoi_ca_compte: Protects and supports the most vulnerable minors in their daily lives.

20242024S06759.objet_clair: Restoration and maintenance of stained-glass windows in Paris buildings.
20242024S06759.quoi_concretement: Specialist craftspeople clean, repair and consolidate old stained-glass windows, especially in churches. They replace broken pieces using traditional techniques.
20242024S06759.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the beauty and history of Paris architectural heritage for future generations.

20242024F00234.objet_clair: Spare-parts purchases for the city's cleaning trucks and machines.
20242024F00234.quoi_concretement: Supply of engines, brakes and bodywork elements to maintain municipal heavy vehicles. Lets refuse trucks and street sweepers be repaired quickly.

20232023S11533.quoi_concretement: The company adapts trucks and utility vehicles to allow safe passenger transport. Includes seat, seatbelt and specific-equipment installation based on City service needs.
20232023S11533.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures safe, comfortable transport for municipal staff or vulnerable groups in Paris.

20242024S00292.objet_clair: Geological soil studies for future north-Paris construction sites.
20242024S00292.quoi_concretement: Experts analyse ground composition on the right bank and in neighbouring departments. These soundings verify ground strength before launching construction or renovation works.
20242024S00292.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the safety and stability of future public buildings and infrastructure.

20242024F11809.objet_clair: Office-chair purchase and installation for municipal services.
20242024F11809.quoi_concretement: The supplier delivers and installs ergonomic furniture in City of Paris offices. Includes work armchairs and chairs for staff to equip the various administrative services.

20232023S11894.objet_clair: Inventory and condition assessment of windows in municipal buildings.
20232023S11894.quoi_concretement: Technicians inspect frames and glazing in City buildings. They list the repairs needed to improve insulation or safety of existing windows.
20232023S11894.pourquoi_ca_compte: Identifies thermal-leak buildings to better insulate schools and town halls.

20232023S11820.objet_clair: Pest control and insanitation prevention in public buildings.
20232023S11820.quoi_concretement: Teams disinfect, eradicate rats or insects in City facilities and staff premises. The aim is to maintain strict hygiene conditions in venues welcoming the public.
20232023S11820.pourquoi_ca_compte: Protects user and staff health by preventing rat or insect proliferation.

20242024S13550.objet_clair: Insurance covering damage caused by City vehicles.
20242024S13550.quoi_concretement: This insurance contract protects the City in case of an accident involving its vehicles. Lets victims be compensated and covers third-party liability costs of the municipal fleet.

20242024S04338.objet_clair: Operation of a day-care in the Maraîchers quarter.
20242024S04338.quoi_concretement: The Crescendo association runs daily welcome of young children, teaching supervision and premises upkeep. Manages staff and activities at this early-childhood facility.
20242024S04338.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides quality, local childcare for area parents.

20242024S00399.objet_clair: Conversion of school yards into green, cool spaces.
20242024S00399.quoi_concretement: Pariseine manages the works to replace schoolyard tarmac with vegetation and permeable floors. These fit-outs create cool islands accessible to children.
20242024S00399.pourquoi_ca_compte: Adapts schools to climate change so children suffer less from summer heat.

20242024S03834.objet_clair: Sports-event organisation and promotion at City of Paris venues.
20242024S03834.quoi_concretement: The company manages the logistics and communications of sports events organised by the town hall. Handles site set-up and public welcome to ensure smooth competitions.
20242024S03834.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets free or accessible sports activities be offered everywhere in the capital.

20242024S02344.objet_clair: Design and supervision of redesign works for streets and squares of south Paris.
20242024S02344.quoi_concretement: Architects and engineers draw the future plans of public spaces. They then supervise works to ensure new fit-outs (pavements, squares) meet planned schedule and quality.
20242024S02344.pourquoi_ca_compte: These studies ensure future area fit-outs are well thought-out and durable.

20242024T03506.objet_clair: Tree-pit fit-out and protection in the 5th, 6th, 7th, 9th, 10th and 14th districts.
20242024T03506.quoi_concretement: Workers operate on pavements to enlarge or renovate tree-pit areas. The aim is to better protect roots and ease rainwater infiltration into the soil.
20242024T03506.pourquoi_ca_compte: Helps trees grow better in the city and fights heatwaves.

20242024T03507.objet_clair: Tree-pit fit-out and protection in the 8th, 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th districts.
20242024T03507.quoi_concretement: Works are carried out around trees on the roadway to improve their setting. Surfaces are reworked to let water through and protect the health of urban plantings.
20242024T03507.pourquoi_ca_compte: These fit-outs encourage urban-nature presence and improve residents' setting.

20242024S03399.objet_clair: Maintenance of parks, gardens and green spaces in the 15th, 16th and 17th districts.
20242024S03399.quoi_concretement: Gardeners handle mowing, hedge trimming and flower-bed cleaning. They watch over the cleanliness and good health of plants in public squares and gardens of these areas.
20242024S03399.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures clean, pleasant parks for resident walks and leisure.

20242024S02332.objet_clair: Design and supervision of redesign works for streets and squares of east Paris.
20242024S02332.quoi_concretement: A technical-studies firm produces plans to renovate public spaces. It coordinates the various trades on works sites to transform streets and squares of east Paris.
20242024S02332.pourquoi_ca_compte: These studies modernise areas and better share space between pedestrians, bikes and cars.

20242024S03328.objet_clair: Maintenance of parks, gardens and green spaces in the 11th, 12th and 20th districts.
20242024S03328.quoi_concretement: Landscape teams provide daily plant care, leaf collection and watering. They work in neighbourhood gardens to maintain a quality natural environment.
20242024S03328.pourquoi_ca_compte: Good upkeep preserves local biodiversity and provides well-cared-for relaxation venues for families.

20242024S11824.objet_clair: IT maintenance of management software used by the City of Paris.
20242024S11824.quoi_concretement: The company ensures proper running and updating of IT tools used to manage the town hall's finances or HR. Intervenes for breakdowns or technical bugs.

20242024F01406.objet_clair: New shelters and outdoor storage in Paris streets.
20242024F01406.quoi_concretement: The company will supply and install storage equipment such as bike shelters or chests in the public space. These fit-outs better organise street furniture.
20242024F01406.pourquoi_ca_compte: Frees pavement space and secures bike parking.

20242024F03552.objet_clair: Respiratory-mask purchase and maintenance for staff working underground.
20242024F03552.quoi_concretement: The company supplies respiratory-protection equipment to Paris staff working in confined spaces such as sewers. Also provides maintenance of this safety equipment.
20242024F03552.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the safety and health of staff maintaining the underground networks essential to the city.

20242024S02339.objet_clair: Technical studies for redesign of streets and squares in west Paris.
20242024S02339.quoi_concretement: A studies firm produces technical plans to transform public space (pavements, squares, roadway) in the western districts. It supervises the future works.
20242024S02339.pourquoi_ca_compte: An essential step before transforming streets to make them more pleasant or accessible.

20242024T03200.objet_clair: Tree-pit fit-out and protection in five east-Paris districts.
20242024T03200.quoi_concretement: The company carries out works around trees in the 11th, 12th, 13th, 19th and 20th districts. Includes installation of grilles or permeable surfacing to protect roots.
20242024T03200.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves urban-tree health and makes pavements cleaner and easier to use.

20242024S12498.objet_clair: Operation and management of the Carreau du Temple culture and sports centre.

20242024000010.objet_clair: School-trip and short-stay organisation for Paris college students.
20242024000010.quoi_concretement: ODCVL organises full holiday stays including activities and accommodation for pupils. These outings encourage social mix and learning autonomy.
20242024000010.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides Paris young people access to holidays and supervised leisure activities at affordable prices.

20242024000005.objet_clair: School-trip and short-stay organisation for Paris college students.
20242024000005.quoi_concretement: Évasion 78 plans and supervises several-day trips for the capital's college pupils. The programme includes sports, cultural and relaxation activities.
20242024000005.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides Paris young people access to holidays and supervised leisure activities at affordable prices.

20242024T04040.objet_clair: Repair and renovation of narrow, inaccessible sewer pipework.
20242024T04040.quoi_concretement: Valentin works on drainage pipes too small for a technician to enter. It uses robots or relining techniques to consolidate the underground network without digging trenches.
20242024T04040.pourquoi_ca_compte: Prevents waste-water leaks and roadway collapses while limiting surface works.

20242024T04032.objet_clair: Renovation of small pipework on the city's sewer network.
20242024T04032.quoi_concretement: This works site covers refurbishment of underground pipes that cannot be walked through. The works ensure network water-tightness and proper waste-water drainage from homes.
20242024T04032.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures proper waste-water drainage and protects the environment from polluting leaks.

20242024T03758.objet_clair: Renovation of synthetic lawns in districts 1 to 15.
20242024T03758.quoi_concretement: Companies will replace worn synthetic turf at municipal sports grounds. The works cover facilities in the first fifteen districts of the capital.
20242024T03758.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides safer, higher-quality sports grounds for clubs and pupils.

20242024T03761.objet_clair: Renovation of major synthetic-turf sports grounds.
20242024T03761.quoi_concretement: This contract refurbishes the synthetic lawns of the city's major sports grounds. The aim is to maintain high-performance playing surfaces suited to intensive practice.
20242024T03761.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures availability and comfort of major Paris sports facilities year-round.

20242024T02250.quoi_concretement: Renovation and interior fit-out works are planned at 4 rue Boucry. The aim is to transform or modernise these premises to host City administrative services.

20242024T11470.objet_clair: Redesign of rues Nationale, Sthrau and Baptiste Renard in the 13th.
20242024T11470.quoi_concretement: Roadway works will transform these three streets. Includes pavement and roadway refurbishment and possibly the creation of new circulation spaces.
20242024T11470.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves the local setting and travel safety for area residents.

20242024T00747.objet_clair: Heating and ventilation modernisation in historic monuments.
20242024T00747.quoi_concretement: Specialists will update air-conditioning and heating systems in places of worship or listed monuments. The aim is to better regulate temperature to protect the buildings.
20242024T00747.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves Paris's historic heritage while improving visitor comfort.

20242024T05594.objet_clair: Heating-system modernisation of four buildings in the 14th district.
20242024T05594.quoi_concretement: The project replaces the old energy source with a more modern solution and installs a new hot-water circuit. The works cover a set of four municipal buildings.
20242024T05594.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts public-building energy use and ecological footprint.

20242024F08259.quoi_concretement: The City orders spare parts such as wings, bumpers or doors to repair its vehicle fleet. This stock ensures routine maintenance of municipal cars and trucks.

20232023S10813.quoi_concretement: Experts will check the proper running of alarms, extinguishers and smoke-extraction systems. These regular inspections are mandatory for all buildings welcoming the public.
20232023S10813.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures user and staff safety in case of fire in municipal buildings.

20242024S08083.objet_clair: Technical-design software purchase and maintenance for City services.
20242024S08083.quoi_concretement: The City buys licences for specialised software used by engineers and architects. These tools let urban-infrastructure plans be drawn and managed digitally.

20242024T10698.objet_clair: Rue de Richelieu redesign in the 1st and 2nd districts.
20242024T10698.quoi_concretement: Roadway works will transform rue de Richelieu. Includes pavement and roadway renovation and new street-furniture installation to improve traffic.
20242024T10698.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves pedestrian comfort and beautifies the local setting in this historic central-Paris area.

20242024T04114.objet_clair: Energy renovation works in municipal buildings.
20242024T04114.quoi_concretement: The company modernises heating, ventilation and insulation systems. The aim is to cut energy use and improve user thermal comfort.
20242024T04114.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts the City's carbon footprint and saves on public-building energy bills.

20242024F10215.objet_clair: Recycling-bin installation in town halls, libraries and cultural centres.
20242024F10215.quoi_concretement: Sorting bins and waste-collection tools will be installed in various Paris public venues. Covers town halls, libraries and City cultural facilities.
20242024F10215.pourquoi_ca_compte: Eases recycling for citizens and municipal staff during their public-service visits.

20242024F11810.objet_clair: Adapted office-equipment purchases for staff with disabilities.
20242024F11810.quoi_concretement: The City orders specific equipment such as adapted keyboards, special screens or ergonomic chairs. These tools let disabled municipal staff work in good conditions.
20242024F11810.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures inclusion and workplace accessibility for all City of Paris staff.

20242024S06957.objet_clair: Accurate mapping of Paris sewer and drainage networks.
20242024S06957.quoi_concretement: Technicians take underground geometric measurements to update sewer plans. These surveys give a better view of pipework condition to plan future works.
20242024S06957.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures proper water drainage and prevents leak or flood risks.

20242024S10128.objet_clair: Appliance repair in schools and municipal services.
20242024S10128.quoi_concretement: A provider intervenes to troubleshoot and repair washing machines, dishwashers or ovens that have broken down. The aim is to extend equipment lifespan rather than systematically replacing.
20242024S10128.pourquoi_ca_compte: Avoids waste by repairing equipment in school canteens and City services.

20242024S03335.objet_clair: Maintenance of gardens and green spaces in north-Paris cemeteries.
20242024S03335.quoi_concretement: Gardeners handle lawn mowing, hedge trimming and walkway weeding. These interventions ensure the cleanliness and floral display of north-Paris cemeteries.
20242024S03335.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a dignified, peaceful, well-maintained setting for visiting families.

20242024S02356.objet_clair: IT-tool and office-software training for City staff.
20242024S02356.quoi_concretement: Specialised trainers work with municipal employees to teach them to use common software such as Word or Excel and the town hall's new digital tools.
20242024S02356.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better-trained staff means a more effective public service and more modern handling of citizen files.

20242024S07156.objet_clair: Studies and works supervision for ventilation in west Île-de-France public buildings.
20242024S07156.quoi_concretement: Experts design and supervise installation or renovation of ventilation and air-conditioning systems at City premises. They ensure works meet technical standards.
20242024S07156.pourquoi_ca_compte: Good ventilation ensures air quality and the comfort of users and staff in municipal buildings.

20242024S03332.objet_clair: Park and garden maintenance in eight central and west Paris districts.
20242024S03332.quoi_concretement: Professional gardeners handle mowing, hedge trimming, weeding and plant care in the green spaces of the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th and 10th districts.
20242024S03332.pourquoi_ca_compte: Maintains clean, pleasant and safe parks for residents to walk and relax in.

20242024S07164.objet_clair: Studies and works supervision for ventilation in east Île-de-France public buildings.
20242024S07164.quoi_concretement: Specialists manage renovation projects for air-renewal systems at City facilities in the East zone. They check proper site execution.
20242024S07164.pourquoi_ca_compte: Effective ventilation is essential for occupant health and to cut building energy use.

20242024S03333.objet_clair: Maintenance of municipal green spaces outside Paris in Île-de-France.
20242024S03333.quoi_concretement: Teams provide cleaning, watering and landscape maintenance of land and gardens owned by the City of Paris but located in the suburbs.
20242024S03333.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures preservation of biodiversity and cleanliness of City-managed sites, even outside the city.

20242024T06458.objet_clair: Redesign of the small forecourt around Notre-Dame de Paris cathedral.
20242024T06458.quoi_concretement: Public-works companies transform the floor, install new street furniture and beautify the cathedral's immediate surroundings to better welcome visitors.
20242024T06458.pourquoi_ca_compte: The project makes the surroundings of this historic monument more accessible, greener and pleasant for pedestrians.

20242024S00187.objet_clair: Maintenance and updates of the Paris-libraries management software.
20242024S00187.quoi_concretement: IT specialists fix bugs and add new features to the system that manages book and DVD lending and the library catalogue.
20242024S00187.pourquoi_ca_compte: This is what lets Parisians keep reserving and borrowing materials easily across the municipal network.

20242024S07179.objet_clair: Project management of small renovation works at City buildings in Île-de-France.
20242024S07179.quoi_concretement: Architects or engineers coordinate small-scale sites such as repairs or bring-up to standard to maintain Paris's property heritage.
20242024S07179.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures public facilities stay safe and functional daily through quick, supervised interventions.

20242024F01057.objet_clair: Forklift purchase and maintenance for City services.
20242024F01057.quoi_concretement: The City buys new lifting equipment and funds its technical maintenance. These forklifts move heavy loads in municipal warehouses and technical centres.

20242024S00053.objet_clair: Cleaning of public spaces at Forum des Halles and Canopée.
20242024S00053.quoi_concretement: Cleanliness staff intervene daily to wash floors, windows and empty bins in the Forum des Halles area. The aim is to maintain cleanliness at this very-busy passing place.
20242024S00053.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures a clean, pleasant setting for the thousands of visitors and travellers passing through the Halles each day.

20242024S04337.objet_clair: Operation of the Maxime Lisbonne day-care by a specialist provider.
20242024S04337.quoi_concretement: An association takes charge of daily operation of this early-childhood facility. Includes child supervision by professionals, meals and premises upkeep.
20242024S04337.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures quality day-care places for area young children and supports working parents.

20242024T11330.objet_clair: Greening works on Boulevard Sérurier in the 19th district.
20242024T11330.quoi_concretement: The company converts part of the roadway to plant trees and vegetation. The works site cuts tarmac surface to give more space to nature on this road route.
20242024T11330.pourquoi_ca_compte: Fights urban heat islands and provides a greener, more breathable setting for boulevard residents.

20242024T04154.objet_clair: Energy renovation of the Providence School.
20242024T04154.quoi_concretement: Works to improve the school's thermal insulation and heating system. The aim is to cut the building's energy use while improving pupil comfort.
20242024T04154.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a more stable temperature for children, summer and winter, while cutting the City's energy bills.

20242024T05707.objet_clair: Urban-forest creation at Place de l'Hôtel de Ville.
20242024T05707.quoi_concretement: The project plants many trees and shrubs directly on the town-hall forecourt. The works include soil preparation and irrigation-system installation to transform this mineral square.
20242024T05707.pourquoi_ca_compte: Creates a natural cool space at the heart of Paris to protect residents during heatwaves.

20242024000007.quoi_concretement: A provider organises short stays outside Paris for children enrolled in leisure centres. Includes transport, accommodation, meals and educational or sports activities.
20242024000007.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets children who don't usually go on holiday discover new horizons and have group fun.

20242024S00685.objet_clair: Olympic-flame relay organisation in the streets of Paris.
20242024S00685.quoi_concretement: An agency manages logistics, security and entertainment of the flame's route across the capital. Includes barrier set-up, sound and festive events along the way.
20242024S00685.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the smooth running of this historic event and lets Parisians celebrate the arrival of the Olympic Games.

20242024S05589.objet_clair: Management training for City of Paris managers.
20242024S05589.quoi_concretement: Trainers work with town-hall managers to improve their working and team-management methods. The aim is to professionalise leadership across the various municipal services.

20242024S12562.objet_clair: Advice for renewing the district-heating contract.
20242024S12562.quoi_concretement: Experts support the City to prepare the future district-heating contract. They study technical and financial aspects to ensure heat supply to Paris buildings.
20242024S12562.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures effective, fairly priced and greener heating for thousands of households connected to the network.

20242024S03593.objet_clair: Natural-lawn maintenance at Stade Christophe Dominici.
20242024S03593.quoi_concretement: Specialist gardeners handle mowing, watering and care of the lawns of this 16th-district stadium. Maintains a high-quality pitch for training and matches.
20242024S03593.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides quality, well-maintained sports facilities for Paris clubs and athletes.

20242024S02608.objet_clair: Plastic-free meal-tray delivery for the Olympic Games.
20242024S02608.quoi_concretement: A caterer prepares and delivers meals served in reusable or biodegradable containers during the event. The aim is to remove single-use plastic waste at official receptions.
20242024S02608.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts the environmental impact of major Paris events by limiting waste production.

20242024S05382.objet_clair: Renovation of municipal buildings such as schools or sports centres.
20242024S05382.quoi_concretement: Architects and engineers supervise rehabilitation works on City buildings. They coordinate the site to modernise structures and improve thermal comfort.
20242024S05382.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides more modern, comfortable and energy-efficient public buildings.

20242024S10719.objet_clair: Reinforced support for Child Welfare children.
20242024S10719.quoi_concretement: Specialist professionals work day and night to support young people placed under City protection. They provide educational and medical follow-up tailored to each child's needs.
20242024S10719.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the protection, safety and well-being of the capital's most vulnerable children.

20242024S04360.objet_clair: Maintenance and breakdown repair of cooling systems in public buildings.
20242024S04360.quoi_concretement: Technicians provide regular maintenance and emergency repairs of cooling systems. Ensures their proper running in facilities welcoming the public.
20242024S04360.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures welcome in acceptable temperature conditions, especially during heatwaves.

20242024S12135.objet_clair: Technical expertise for water and hydraulic-network management.
20242024S12135.quoi_concretement: Engineers advise the City on the running of water networks and drainage systems. They produce studies to optimise water flow and prevent technical breakdowns.
20242024S12135.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures proper operation of fountains and water networks to prevent waste and cuts.

20242024S12137.objet_clair: Technical assistance for water and sewer management in Paris.
20242024S12137.quoi_concretement: Experts advise the City on maintenance and modernisation of the drainage network. They help monitor water flow and prevent technical breakdowns in underground pipework.
20242024S12137.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures proper sewer operation and prevents flooding or pollution in the Seine.

20242024F04309.quoi_concretement: The supplier delivers dry food and drinks to City-run facilities. Mainly covers school canteens, day-cares or Paris reception centres.
20242024F04309.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures daily meals for children and vulnerable people welcomed by public services.

20242024S05385.objet_clair: Technical studies for thermal and structural renovation of buildings.
20242024S05385.quoi_concretement: Studies firms design plans to reinforce the structures of public buildings and improve their heating. They work on insulation and air flow to deliver energy savings.
20242024S05385.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts municipal-building energy use and improves user comfort, summer and winter.

20242024F10216.objet_clair: Recycling-bin installation at Paris sports centres.
20242024F10216.quoi_concretement: The company installs sorting bins and signage equipment at City gymnasiums and stadiums. The aim is to make waste recycling easier for athletes and spectators.
20242024F10216.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts waste produced during sports activities and encourages good environmental habits.

20242024F06273.objet_clair: Children's-book purchases for libraries in several districts.
20242024F06273.quoi_concretement: Libraries in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 9th, 10th and 19th districts order new youth books. Includes albums, novels and comics to renew the collections.
20242024F06273.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a varied, recent free reading choice for children and families in the area.

20242024S11182.objet_clair: Maintenance of intrusion or attack-alert systems.
20242024S11182.quoi_concretement: Technicians maintain the audio and visual devices that warn occupants of a public building of immediate danger. They check that alarms and alert boxes work perfectly.
20242024S11182.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures staff and public safety in municipal facilities in case of serious threat.

20242024F00315.objet_clair: Wooden bench and furniture installation in yards and public spaces.
20242024F00315.quoi_concretement: A specialist company manufactures and installs benches, tables or play structures in wood. This equipment goes to schoolyards or small parks to create more natural relaxation spaces.
20242024F00315.pourquoi_ca_compte: Makes public spaces more welcoming and less concrete-heavy thanks to natural materials.

20242024S05379.objet_clair: Project management of waterproofing works for Paris historic buildings.
20242024S05379.quoi_concretement: Architects and engineers supervise sites aimed at protecting the roofs and facades of monuments from water leaks. They ensure works respect the building's old architecture.
20242024S05379.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the capital's historic heritage from damp- and time-related damage.

20242024S11185.objet_clair: Installation and maintenance of attack-alert systems in municipal buildings.
20242024S11185.quoi_concretement: Specialists install and repair audio and visual alarms at City facilities. These devices immediately warn occupants in case of intrusion or serious danger.
20242024S11185.pourquoi_ca_compte: Reinforces citizen and staff safety in public venues in case of threat.

20232023S11535.objet_clair: Bespoke fit-out of vans and utility vehicles for City services.
20232023S11535.quoi_concretement: The company adapts the interior and exterior of vehicles under 3.5 tonnes. Includes shelf, protection or specific-equipment installation based on technical-staff needs.
20232023S11535.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets municipal staff have suitable working tools to intervene effectively in the streets.

20242024F11825.objet_clair: Ready-to-use tarmac purchase for quick street and pavement repair.
20242024F11825.quoi_concretement: The City orders stocks of cold-mix tarmac, an easy-to-lay material with no large heating equipment. Lets staff intervene quickly to fill potholes or repair small damaged zones.
20242024F11825.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves pedestrian and cyclist comfort and safety by removing roadway holes.

20242024S02358.objet_clair: Maintenance of the City's administrative-management software.
20242024S02358.quoi_concretement: Teamnet ensures proper running and updating of specialised IT programs. These tools let staff handle administrative cases and manage municipal services.

20242024S05137.objet_clair: Technical studies to monitor and maintain Paris bridges and tunnels.
20242024S05137.quoi_concretement: Experts analyse the structure and strength of Paris civil-engineering structures. These diagnostics let necessary works be planned to prevent any major damage to the city's bridges and walls.
20242024S05137.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures user safety by checking that bridges and tunnels stay solid and danger-free.

20242024T00379.objet_clair: Electrical-installation renovation at neighbourhood food markets.
20242024T00379.quoi_concretement: Electricians replace cables and supply terminals at market squares. Lets traders safely connect their equipment such as refrigerated displays.
20242024T00379.pourquoi_ca_compte: Maintains local-market activity and ensures electrical safety for traders and customers.

20242024F01652.objet_clair: Sound-equipment rental for City public events.
20242024F01652.quoi_concretement: This contract rents speakers and microphones for events or ceremonies. The equipment is delivered and installed on-the-spot to ensure sound at public gatherings.
20242024F01652.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures good sound quality for Parisians at events held in public spaces.

20242024T02142.objet_clair: Major renovation and outdoor fit-out of Eiders day-care in the 19th.
20242024T02142.quoi_concretement: This site covers the building's structure and creation of outdoor spaces for children. The aim is to fully restructure the day-care to improve toddler welcome and comfort.
20242024T02142.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides more modern, pleasant premises to welcome the area's young children.

20242024T08248.objet_clair: Extension of the Coulée Verte René-Dumont in the 12th district.
20242024T08248.quoi_concretement: Landscape designers will fit out new green spaces to extend the existing planted promenade. The site plans tree planting and walking-path creation.
20242024T08248.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides more walking and nature space for area residents.

20242024F11837.objet_clair: Cleaning and maintenance of Stade Charléty.
20242024F11837.quoi_concretement: A specialist company maintains cleanliness of the stands, changing rooms and stadium surroundings. Regular interventions keep the facility in good condition for athletes and the public.
20242024F11837.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures clean, hygienic welcome at competitions and training sessions.

20242024T09288.objet_clair: Redesign and greening of rue Schubert.
20242024T09288.quoi_concretement: The street will be transformed to give more space to plants and pedestrians. The works include pavement renovation and creation of green zones to cut city heat.
20242024T09288.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves residents' setting and adapts the street to climate change.

20242024T08007.objet_clair: Riquet quarter and Orgues de Flandre renovation.
20242024T08007.quoi_concretement: This site covers public-space refurbishment around the Riquet block in the 19th district. Modernises floors, lighting and accesses to make the area more pleasant.
20242024T08007.pourquoi_ca_compte: Beautifies and secures circulation spaces for residents of this large complex.

20242024T08063.objet_clair: Extension and renovation of Marie Curie Garden in the 13th district.
20242024T08063.quoi_concretement: The first works phase extends the surface of the current park. Landscape fit-outs and leisure structures will be installed to provide a new relaxation space for families.
20242024T08063.pourquoi_ca_compte: Creates a larger green lung for residents of a dense area.

20242024F03396.objet_clair: Spare-parts purchase for City Renault vehicles.
20242024F03396.quoi_concretement: The City orders spare parts and accessories to maintain its fleet of Renault cars and vans. Lets repairs be carried out at municipal workshops.

20242024S01468.objet_clair: Training and competitive-exam preparation for future City engineers.
20242024S01468.quoi_concretement: The Paris City Engineering School organises learning sessions and internships to train technical staff. The programme includes preparation for internal competitive exams.

20242024F00299.objet_clair: Spare-parts purchase for City Ford vehicles.
20242024F00299.quoi_concretement: This contract obtains the components needed (engines, brakes, bodywork) to repair the Ford vehicles used by the various municipal services.

20242024F00281.objet_clair: Cross-country and mountain bike purchases, classic or electric.
