20242024F00281.pourquoi_ca_compte: Encourages eco-friendly travel for city staff and cuts use of polluting motorised vehicles.

20242024S07380.objet_clair: IT maintenance of the water and drainage management software.
20242024S07380.quoi_concretement: Technicians ensure proper running and updating of the IT system named Tigre 7. This software is used by City services to monitor and manage the sewer and drainage network.
20242024S07380.pourquoi_ca_compte: A reliable IT system is essential to prevent breakdowns in waste-water and rainwater management.

20242024T00136.objet_clair: Roof installation and fit-out at the Dunois sports ground.
20242024T00136.quoi_concretement: The company will install a covering structure above the Dunois physical-education ground. The project also plans fit-out works to improve athlete comfort on this site.
20242024T00136.pourquoi_ca_compte: Residents and schools will be able to use the sports ground year-round, even in rain or heat.

20242024S07186.objet_clair: Technical advice on building heating, ventilation and cooling.
20242024S07186.quoi_concretement: Experts support the City to check and adjust heating and ventilation installations. They ensure equipment runs optimally and energy-efficiently in public buildings.
20242024S07186.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better heating and air management cuts the City's energy bill and improves user comfort.

20242024T06652.objet_clair: Greening works on rue du Commandant Mouchotte in the 14th.
20242024T06652.quoi_concretement: The company will transform the street by planting trees and vegetation. The works cut concrete space to create a greener, cooler space at the heart of the area.
20242024T06652.pourquoi_ca_compte: The project fights urban heat islands and makes the street more pleasant for pedestrians.

20242024T03132.objet_clair: Window and door replacement and modernisation in public buildings.
20242024T03132.quoi_concretement: Carpenters will change old outer windows and doors with newer, higher-performance models. The works cover various municipal facilities needing thermal renovation.
20242024T03132.pourquoi_ca_compte: Modern windows improve insulation, delivering heating savings and better noise protection for users.

20242024S01013.objet_clair: Flag and decoration installation in the streets for events.
20242024S01013.quoi_concretement: The company designs and installs flags, banners and decorations on street furniture. These installations happen during national celebrations or exceptional events in the capital.
20242024S01013.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets the city be dressed in the colours of important events, reinforcing the festive look and visitor welcome.

20242024T03091.objet_clair: New day-care construction in the 15th district.
20242024T03091.quoi_concretement: This site covers construction of a building dedicated to early-childhood welcome in the Vaugirard sector. The building will be designed to welcome young children in modern conditions.
20242024T03091.pourquoi_ca_compte: The project increases day-care places available for area families.

20242024F11831.objet_clair: Organic and fair-trade cotton cleaning-overall purchase.
20242024F11831.quoi_concretement: The City of Paris buys workwear for its cleaning staff. These overalls are made of organic and fair-trade cotton to ensure responsible production conditions.
20242024F11831.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures healthy equipment for staff while supporting responsible textile production.

20232023S11693.objet_clair: Distribution of municipal flyers and newspapers in letterboxes.
20232023S11693.quoi_concretement: A provider distributes City of Paris information documents directly to residents. Covers municipal magazines or works notices with no specific addressee name.
20232023S11693.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets Parisians stay informed of city and area news directly at home.

20242024S05476.objet_clair: Surveillance and technical expertise of Paris buildings and monuments.
20242024S05476.quoi_concretement: Engineers inspect the condition of the city's structures and monuments. They detect defects, advise on works to carry out and monitor building evolution to prevent damage.
20242024S05476.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures user safety and preserves the capital's historic heritage from time-related wear.

20232023F11694.objet_clair: Eco-friendly workwear purchase for municipal staff.
20232023F11694.quoi_concretement: Supply of polos, T-shirts and sweatshirts for City of Paris staff. These clothes are made from organic cotton and respect fair-trade principles.
20232023F11694.pourquoi_ca_compte: Dresses public staff in comfortable outfits while supporting more environmentally responsible textile production.

20232023T11508.objet_clair: Road renovation using an eco-friendly cold-laid tarmac technique.
20232023T11508.quoi_concretement: The company refurbishes Paris roadways using cold mixes. This technical process renovates streets while limiting heat and fumes during works.
20232023T11508.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves street condition for users while cutting pollution and the ecological impact of road sites.

20242024F06268.objet_clair: Book purchases for north and west Paris libraries.
20242024F06268.quoi_concretement: Several booksellers supply adult books to renew the collections of municipal libraries in the 7th, 8th, 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th districts.
20242024F06268.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures free access to culture and offers regular new releases to readers in these areas.

20242024F03555.objet_clair: Safety equipment for staff working at height.
20242024F03555.quoi_concretement: Supply and maintenance of harnesses, ropes and protection systems for municipal staff working at height. Covers in particular building maintenance or tree pruning.
20242024F03555.pourquoi_ca_compte: Protects city-staff lives during their dangerous technical interventions at height.

20242024S06941.objet_clair: Design and production of the 'À Paris' municipal information magazine.
20242024S06941.quoi_concretement: A communications agency provides graphic design, layout and writing of the city's magazine. The magazine is distributed to residents to inform them of local projects and services.
20242024S06941.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets Parisians stay informed about their city's news, new fit-outs and cultural events.

20242024F06258.quoi_concretement: Selected booksellers supply adult books to enrich the shelves of municipal libraries in the 5th, 6th, 13th and 14th districts.
20242024F06258.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets area residents benefit from a wide choice of recent, varied reading near home.

20242024S05477.objet_clair: Expertise and surveillance of public buildings in the 16th and 17th districts.
20242024S05477.quoi_concretement: Specialists examine the condition of city-owned structures and monuments in these two districts. They recommend the necessary repairs to keep buildings in good condition.
20242024S05477.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the strength and longevity of public infrastructure in west Paris.

20242024F06930.objet_clair: Small electric-van purchase for municipal services.
20242024F06930.quoi_concretement: The city acquires new compact 100% electric utility vehicles. These vans will be used by staff to transport equipment or intervene in the capital's streets.
20242024F06930.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts noise and air pollution from City service travel.

20242024S07349.objet_clair: Free sports activities in the 20th district.
20242024S07349.quoi_concretement: Sports leaders run local sports sessions for 20th-district residents. These activities encourage physical practice and prevent health or isolation issues.
20242024S07349.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides free sports access for all area residents, encouraging health and social ties.

20242024T12286.objet_clair: Foundation-consolidation works of a school in the 19th district.
20242024T12286.quoi_concretement: Major works are carried out on the bases of the school building on Avenue Simon Bolivar. The aim is to stabilise the structure to ensure pupil and staff safety.
20242024T12286.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the safety and longevity of school buildings welcoming children.

20242024T10053.objet_clair: Waterproofing renovation of Pont Alexandre III.
20242024T10053.quoi_concretement: Workers intervene on the iconic Paris bridge to refurbish the protective layers preventing water from seeping in. These works are essential to protect the historic structure from corrosion.
20242024T10053.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves one of Paris's most iconic monuments and ensures the safety of users crossing it.

20242024S09832.objet_clair: Information-panel printing and installation for events.
20242024S09832.quoi_concretement: This contract covers manufacture, installation and removal of temporary signage at City-organised events. Includes panels, banners or posters guiding the public.
20242024S09832.pourquoi_ca_compte: Eases citizen orientation and information at major Paris gatherings and events.

20242024000006.objet_clair: Holiday-camp and mini-stay organisation for young people.
20242024000006.quoi_concretement: Group holiday stays are organised for Paris children and teenagers. The provider manages accommodation, activities and supervision, especially at the Roche du Trésor centre.
20242024000006.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets Paris children go on holiday and discover new settings at affordable prices.

20232023S11822.objet_clair: Cleaning and rat eradication of technical premises and public spaces.
20232023S11822.quoi_concretement: Teams intervene to sanitise technical premises and street surroundings. They remove pests and clean unsanitary areas to ensure city-infrastructure cleanliness.
20232023S11822.pourquoi_ca_compte: Limits rat proliferation and ensures hygiene of spaces shared by all Parisians.

20242024S07149.quoi_concretement: Experts supervise works to install or repair ventilation systems in swimming pools or sports centres. The aim is to ensure healthy air and regulate humidity in these buildings.
20242024S07149.pourquoi_ca_compte: Good ventilation prevents mould and ensures respiratory comfort for users and staff.

20242024000002.objet_clair: Holiday-camp and short-stay organisation for Paris college students.
20242024000002.quoi_concretement: The Saint-Étienne association takes charge of accommodation, transport and activities for pupils during their holidays. These stays let young people discover new settings outside Paris.
20242024000002.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides accessible holidays for families and encourages social mix between the city's young people.

20242024S00835.objet_clair: Technical and logistics organisation of Paris sports events.
20242024S00835.quoi_concretement: A specialist agency manages structure set-up, sound and entertainment at sports events. It handles all material aspects so competitions run smoothly.
20242024S00835.pourquoi_ca_compte: These events liven up neighbourhoods and encourage sports practice for all residents.

20242024T09129.objet_clair: Full renovation of the day-care at 145 rue de l'Université in the 7th district.
20242024T09129.quoi_concretement: The site plans premises restructuring to modernise welcome of young children. Works cover interior fit-out, insulation and bring-up to standard of play and rest spaces.
20242024T09129.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides more comfortable, safer premises suited to toddler and staff needs.

20242024000001.objet_clair: Holiday-stay and outing organisation for Paris college students.
20242024000001.quoi_concretement: The body plans educational and sports trips for pupils during school holidays. It supervises young people and manages all on-site activities.
20242024000001.pourquoi_ca_compte: These stays let college students develop outside school and discover nature or new sports.

20242024T12579.objet_clair: Emergency repairs in all buildings owned by the City of Paris.
20242024T12579.quoi_concretement: A company intervenes quickly in case of unplanned breakdown or damage (water leak, electrical issue, broken glass). Covers schools, town halls and sports centres.
20242024T12579.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures user safety and lets public services stay open despite technical incidents.

20242024S06401.objet_clair: Restoration and maintenance of the City's historic and administrative furniture.
20242024S06401.quoi_concretement: Specialist craftspeople repair and clean old or valuable furniture from Paris collections. They use specific techniques to preserve wood, fabrics and structures.
20242024S06401.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves Paris's historic heritage and extends the life of objects used in public venues.

20242024S11823.quoi_concretement: Experts produce individual or group skills assessments. They help staff review their careers and define a new professional project within or outside the town hall.

20242024S02329.objet_clair: Planted schoolyard at Guillaume Apollinaire College (15th).
20242024S02329.quoi_concretement: The project converts the tarmacked schoolyard into a cooler, more natural space. Trees are planted and heat-non-absorbing materials are installed to better cope with heatwaves.
20242024S02329.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides pupils a more pleasant break space, less stifling during heatwaves.

20242024F06263.objet_clair: New-book purchases for libraries in the 11th, 12th and 20th districts.
20242024F06263.quoi_concretement: The City orders a wide selection of adult novels, essays and comics. These books renew the shelves of east-Paris municipal libraries for free lending.
20242024F06263.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures all residents free access to literary new releases and a varied culture.

20242024S07335.objet_clair: Sports-activity organisation for young people in the 16th and 17th districts.
20242024S07335.quoi_concretement: Leaders run sports sessions and tournaments at neighbourhood sports centres. These free activities engage young people during their free time and encourage respect through sport.
20242024S07335.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides healthy, free leisure for young people to reinforce social ties in neighbourhoods.

20242024T09622.objet_clair: Full redesign of Place de Rungis in the 13th district.
20242024T09622.quoi_concretement: The company refurbishes the roadway, widens pavements and installs new street furniture. The aim is to better share space between pedestrians, cyclists and cars for a more welcoming square.
20242024T09622.pourquoi_ca_compte: Makes the square safer, more accessible and pleasant for residents and passers-by.

20242024T12209.objet_clair: Repair of the retaining walls of the Puebla pavilion at Buttes-Chaumont (19th).
20242024T12209.quoi_concretement: Masonry works consolidate the walls supporting the ground around this historic park building. Stabilises the soil and prevents collapse or landslide risks.
20242024T12209.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the park's heritage and ensures walker safety on sloped paths.

20242024T02019.objet_clair: Insulation and renovation of a nursery school for comfort and accessibility.
20242024T02019.quoi_concretement: Facades are insulated to better retain heat and windows are replaced. The building is also adapted to ease access for children or parents with disabilities.
20242024T02019.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves classroom comfort while cutting the school's energy use.

20242024F11100.objet_clair: Useful-insect purchases to naturally protect Paris gardens.
20242024F11100.quoi_concretement: The City buys beneficial insects such as ladybirds that eat plant pests. A natural solution to care for park trees and flowers without using chemical pesticides.
20242024F11100.pourquoi_ca_compte: Maintains green spaces ecologically, without products toxic to health and biodiversity.

20242024T12380.objet_clair: Ventilation and cooling-system renovation at the Archives de Paris.
20242024T12380.quoi_concretement: The company will install new air-renewal and temperature-control equipment in the building. The works stabilise the storage-room atmosphere.
20242024T12380.pourquoi_ca_compte: Essential to protect the city's historic documents from damp and heat that could destroy them.

20242024T08016.objet_clair: Urban-forest creation at Place de l'Hôtel de Ville.
20242024T08016.quoi_concretement: The project plants many trees and plants on the forecourt to turn this tarmacked zone into a green space. Floors will be adapted to let rainwater through.
20242024T08016.pourquoi_ca_compte: Helps fight city heat and provides a new cool, natural spot for Parisians.

20242024S09363.objet_clair: Maintenance and repair of the City's lifting and handling machines.
20242024S09363.quoi_concretement: The provider provides technical maintenance and supplies spare parts for municipal forklifts and freight lifts. Ensures proper running of the tools used by staff.

20242024T06979.objet_clair: Fit-out and maintenance of the Pereire promenade in the 17th district.
20242024T06979.quoi_concretement: The company will carry out gardening, planting and walkway-renovation works on this promenade. The aim is to maintain the landscape quality and safety of this green space.
20242024T06979.pourquoi_ca_compte: Residents enjoy a better-maintained, safer and more pleasant walking spot daily.

20242024S04382.objet_clair: Studies for the full renovation of Romainville school cluster in the 19th.
20242024S04382.quoi_concretement: Architects will design plans and direct modernisation works on the nursery and primary schools. The project restructures the buildings to better welcome pupils.
20242024S04382.pourquoi_ca_compte: Children and teachers will enjoy a more modern, comfortable, better thermally insulated school.

20242024S10021.objet_clair: Organisation and promotion of the children's-cinema festival 'Mon Premier Festival'.
20242024S10021.quoi_concretement: The association handles film selection, communications and screening organisation at partner cinemas. The event offers reduced rates for young audiences.
20242024S10021.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets families and schools introduce children to cinema with a tailored, accessible programme.

20232023S10833.objet_clair: Accurate geographic and cartographic ground measurements.
20232023S10833.quoi_concretement: Surveyors will take technical measurements to accurately map the relief and limits of certain city zones. This data is used to prepare future works.

20242024F11832.objet_clair: Organic and fair-trade cotton cleaning-overall purchase for cleaning staff.
20242024F11832.quoi_concretement: The City orders environmentally responsible protective clothing for its technical staff. These overalls are for workers in charge of public-building maintenance.

20242024F06295.objet_clair: Foreign-language book purchases for Paris libraries.
20242024F06295.quoi_concretement: Several booksellers supply foreign-language books (excluding Asian languages and Arabic) to municipal libraries. Renews the collections and provides varied reading for residents.
20242024F06295.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets Parisians and visiting foreigners access culture in their original or learning language.

20232023F11695.objet_clair: Organic and fair-trade cotton polos for Paris cleanliness staff.
20232023F11695.quoi_concretement: Sweat France delivers green polos made ecologically and ethically. This clothing is for staff who clean the capital's streets.
20232023F11695.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures dignified working conditions for staff while respecting strict environmental criteria.

20242024F06290.objet_clair: Small-print-run French-language book purchases for libraries.
20242024F06290.quoi_concretement: The City buys French books published by small publishers or in limited quantities. These books are then made available to the public across the municipal-library network.
20242024F06290.pourquoi_ca_compte: Supports publishing diversity and lets less-known authors or rare books be discovered.

20242024S07324.objet_clair: Sports-based prevention activities in the 12th district.
20242024S07324.quoi_concretement: Sports leaders run sessions and events at local sports centres. The aim is to use sport as a prevention and social-bond tool for area young people.
20242024S07324.pourquoi_ca_compte: Encourages youth integration and public health through free or eased access to supervised sport.

20232023F11722.quoi_concretement: Supply of professional clothing (trousers, jackets) made of organic, fair-trade cotton. This clothing is for staff maintaining Paris parks and gardens.
20232023F11722.pourquoi_ca_compte: Combines staff protection and the City's commitment to more responsible, ecological consumption.

20232023S10831.objet_clair: Accurate ground measurement and mapping in west Paris.
20232023S10831.quoi_concretement: Experts take topographic surveys to precisely measure ground dimensions and relief. This data is essential before launching roadway or urban-redesign works.

20242024F06232.objet_clair: Pots and flower-tub purchases for Paris streets and greenhouses.
20242024F06232.quoi_concretement: Supply of containers to grow plants in greenhouses or install vegetation directly on pavements and squares. Includes the equipment needed for the City's horticultural production.
20242024F06232.pourquoi_ca_compte: Contributes to greening the capital and improving residents' setting.

20242024F01791.objet_clair: Upright-piano and seat purchases for the conservatories.
20242024F01791.quoi_concretement: The supplier delivers new pianos and adjustable benches to City cultural facilities. The contract also includes instrument transport and installation.
20242024F01791.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides Paris-conservatory students with quality equipment to learn and practise music.

20232023S10829.objet_clair: Production of accurate Paris-street and pavement plans.
20232023S10829.quoi_concretement: Surveyors precisely measure and map the ground of Paris streets. These surveys are essential to prepare future roadway-redesign or maintenance works.
20232023S10829.pourquoi_ca_compte: An essential step for future roadway works to be well designed and free of measurement errors.

20242024T05319.objet_clair: Heating and ventilation renovation in two 17th-district schools.
20242024T05319.quoi_concretement: Technicians install or repair heating and air-conditioning systems at the Ampère street school and Ronsard college. The aim is to ensure better thermal comfort for pupils.
20242024T05319.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves pupil and teacher comfort while cutting building energy use.

20242024000041.objet_clair: Holiday-camp and stay organisation for Paris college students.
20242024000041.quoi_concretement: An association organises trips and leisure activities during the holidays for Paris college pupils. Includes transport, accommodation and youth supervision.
20242024000041.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets many Paris young people go on holiday and discover new activities with their peers.

20242024T08556.objet_clair: Major renovation of Olympe de Gouges Sports Centre.
20242024T08556.quoi_concretement: This works site covers structural works, structural cleaning and roof refurbishment of the gymnasium. Refurbishes the building to ensure its strength and water-tightness.
20242024T08556.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides athletes and local clubs a safe, modern and well-maintained public facility.

20242024S13556.objet_clair: Insurance to cover risks linked to City sports activities.
20242024S13556.quoi_concretement: The City takes out a contract to protect its third-party liability at sports events or classes it organises. Covers possible damage caused during these activities.
20242024S13556.pourquoi_ca_compte: Legally and financially secures the running of municipal sports activities for users.

20242024F00297.objet_clair: Spare-parts purchase for City Peugeot and Citroën cars.
20242024F00297.quoi_concretement: The City orders mechanical parts (brakes, filters, engines) to maintain and repair its French-brand vehicles. Keeps the municipal fleet in working order.

20242024F11239.objet_clair: Server and IT-storage equipment purchase for municipal services.
20242024F11239.quoi_concretement: The City equips itself with high-performance new servers to store its digital data. This equipment runs the administration's software and online services.

20242024T09046.objet_clair: Place Rhin-et-Danube redesign and renovation works in the 19th.
20242024T09046.quoi_concretement: Workers operate on the square to refurbish floors, improve circulation spaces and beautify the area. The aim is to make this public space more pleasant and better organised.
20242024T09046.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves residents' setting and eases pedestrian travel.

20242024T08961.objet_clair: Extension of Parc de Choisy in the 13th district.
20242024T08961.quoi_concretement: Marcel Villette carries out earthworks and fit-out to extend the park's surface. The project creates new green spaces and walking zones for users.
20242024T08961.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides more greenery and relaxation space for residents of a dense area.

20242024S04495.objet_clair: Technical and noise monitoring of Pont Masséna in the 13th district.
20242024S04495.quoi_concretement: Sensors and cameras are installed to measure noise and monitor the bridge structure's condition. Detects possible cracks or excessive traffic-related noise nuisance.
20242024S04495.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the structure's safety and limits noise pollution for residents.

20242024S07327.objet_clair: Sports-activity organisation for young people in the 13th district.
20242024S07327.quoi_concretement: Leaders run sports sessions and events at the district's sports centres. The aim is to provide educational leisure and encourage health through sport.
20242024S07327.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides free or accessible activities to engage young people and encourage social mix.

20242024S10140.objet_clair: Light-vehicle towing service for the City of Paris.
20242024S10140.quoi_concretement: Depann 2000 intervenes to move badly parked or obstructing vehicles on public roads. Cars are then transported to the municipal pounds.
20242024S10140.pourquoi_ca_compte: Frees public space and ensures smooth traffic and parking for everyone.

20242024T12997.quoi_concretement: Works are carried out on the riverbanks to install solid bases for future raised viewpoints. These fit-outs create safe terraces overlooking the river.
20242024T12997.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves access to the riverbanks and provides new river-landscape observation spots.

20242024T10811.objet_clair: Thermal renovation and facade refurbishment of a 12th-district building.
20242024T10811.quoi_concretement: The works insulate the facades from the outside and renovate the walls of 8-10 avenue Lamoricière. Includes new surfacing to better protect the building from cold and heat.
20242024T10811.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts the building's energy use and improves occupant thermal comfort.

20242024S13548.quoi_concretement: This contract protects the City of Paris from financial risks linked to damage caused or sustained in the context of child protection. A legal and financial cover for this public service.
20242024S13548.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures continuity and financial security for services protecting vulnerable children.

20242024S11541.objet_clair: Development and updates of the City of Paris mobile app.
20242024S11541.quoi_concretement: IT specialists work on creating new features and on technical maintenance of the official app. The aim is to make municipal services more accessible by smartphone.
20242024S11541.pourquoi_ca_compte: Eases access to local information and administrative procedures for Parisians on their phones.

20242024S06882.objet_clair: Maintenance and hosting of the One2Team project-management software.
20242024S06882.quoi_concretement: The company ensures proper running and secure storage of software used by City services to manage their projects. Handles updates and technical support for users.

20242024F06234.objet_clair: Tub and container purchases for green-space maintenance.
20242024F06234.quoi_concretement: Supply of various-sized tubs for City gardeners. This equipment collects and transports plant waste during park and garden maintenance in the capital.
20242024F06234.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the cleanliness and proper upkeep of the capital's parks and gardens.

20242024S07917.quoi_concretement: A medical provider carries out home health checks for municipal employees on sick leave. The aim is to verify the leave is justified and assess the absence duration.

20242024S09560.objet_clair: Maintenance of ventilation and air-extraction systems.
20242024S09560.quoi_concretement: Technical maintenance of systems that extract smoke, dust or odours in municipal buildings. Includes repairs and regular checks to ensure venue safety.
20242024S09560.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures fire safety and air quality in facilities welcoming the public.

20242024F12084.objet_clair: Large-skip purchase and maintenance for Paris recycling centres.
20242024F12084.quoi_concretement: Delivery and repair of removable metal containers used at sorting centres. These skips store and transport bulky waste deposited by residents.
20242024F12084.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets recycling centres run properly and eases bulky-object recycling.

20242024S11044.objet_clair: Maintenance of air-extraction and ventilation systems.

20242024S11044.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures a healthy, safe environment for users of municipal buildings.

20242024S03532.objet_clair: Cleaning of City workwear and linen.

20242024S03532.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures hygiene of the outfits worn by staff intervening daily in the public space.

20241130704381.objet_clair: Lease of 30 parking spaces at the Tour Montparnasse car park.
20241130704381.quoi_concretement: The City of Paris leases private parking spaces to park its service or intervention vehicles near the Tour Montparnasse, in the 15th district.

20242024F06301.objet_clair: Music-score and method-book purchases for conservatories and libraries.
20242024F06301.quoi_concretement: The City buys sheet music and method books for classical and pop styles. These documents are made available to students and users at municipal conservatories and libraries.
20242024F06301.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets Parisians access a wide catalogue of resources for free to learn and practise music.

20242024F10137.objet_clair: Cherry-picker rental for works at height.
20242024F10137.quoi_concretement: The company supplies lifting equipment with or without driver to let municipal staff intervene at height. These machines are used to maintain public buildings or street lighting.

20242024S13192.quoi_concretement: Specialists intervene to treat insect infestations such as bed bugs or cockroaches in City premises. The aim is to ensure cleanliness of public-welcome venues.
20242024S13192.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures hygiene and health-safety conditions in the capital's schools, town halls and public facilities.

20242024T04862.objet_clair: Automatic-irrigation installation at Bois de Boulogne and the École Du Breuil.
20242024T04862.quoi_concretement: Works are carried out to automate irrigation of green spaces at Bois de Boulogne and the École d'Horticulture gardens. The system allows precise water management to feed the plantings.
20242024T04862.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the vegetation of these large natural spaces while preventing water-resource waste.

20242024S00347.objet_clair: Document printing for the City of Paris and district town halls.
20242024S00347.quoi_concretement: This contract produces paper materials such as brochures, posters or administrative forms. These documents inform citizens and help public services run.
20242024S00347.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures access to official information and eases residents' daily administrative procedures.

20242024T09421.objet_clair: Technical maintenance of municipal decoration greenhouses.
20242024T09421.quoi_concretement: The company maintains heating, ventilation and irrigation of the greenhouses where ornamental plants grow. These installations grow flowers that adorn Paris parks and buildings.
20242024T09421.pourquoi_ca_compte: Maintains the floral and plant heritage that beautifies Paris streets and gardens.

20242024S12140.objet_clair: Safety coordination for Parc des Buttes-Chaumont renovation.
20242024S12140.quoi_concretement: An expert oversees the park's landscape-restoration site to prevent accidents. Watches over the works to run safely for workers and walkers passing nearby.
20242024S12140.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets this 19th-district historic park be renovated while ensuring all users' safety.

20232023S10812.objet_clair: Inspection of fire-safety systems in public buildings.
20232023S10812.quoi_concretement: Technicians check proper running of alarms, smoke detectors and extinguishers. These regular inspections are mandatory to ensure people protection in municipal facilities.
20232023S10812.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures user and staff protection from fire risks in venues welcoming the public.

20242024S00374.objet_clair: Full renovation of the Préault day-care in the 19th district.

20242024S07262.objet_clair: Studies for redesign around Gare Montparnasse.

20242024T12912.quoi_concretement: Conversion of schoolyards into 'oasis' with less tarmac and more plants. The works include permeable surfacing and tree planting.
20242024T12912.pourquoi_ca_compte: Protects children from summer heat and provides more natural break spaces.

20242024S01402.objet_clair: Solar-panel installation on the Canopée des Halles roof.

20242024S01402.pourquoi_ca_compte: Speeds the city's energy transition by using public roofs to produce clean energy.

20242024T12977.objet_clair: Viewpoint construction over the Seine at the Marie arm.
20242024T12977.quoi_concretement: Foundation works in the river to install observation platforms. These fit-outs will let walkers stand out over the water.
20242024T12977.pourquoi_ca_compte: Creates new viewpoints and waterside relaxation spaces for Parisians.

20242024T05849.objet_clair: Sports and nature space creation in the Bois de Vincennes.

20242024T04767.objet_clair: Yard greening at Vaucanson School and Montgolfier College.
20242024T04767.quoi_concretement: Replacement of tarmac with natural and plant materials at these schools. The works better manage rainwater and refresh the air.
20242024T04767.pourquoi_ca_compte: Fights urban heatwaves and improves pupils' daily well-being.

20242024000011.objet_clair: Holiday-camp and stay organisation for young people.
20242024000011.quoi_concretement: Full management of group stays for Paris children. The body handles transport, accommodation, meals and leisure activities.
20242024000011.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets many children go on holiday and discover new horizons with their peers.

20242024T02143.objet_clair: Renovation of Eiders day-care in the 19th district.
20242024T02143.quoi_concretement: Workers will carry out restructuring works in this early-childhood building. The aim is to modernise the premises to better welcome children and staff in a renewed setting.
20242024T02143.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves comfort and safety for area toddlers and early-childhood professionals.

20242024S02990.objet_clair: Architectural design for the extension of a building on Boulevard Saint-Marcel.

20242024S02990.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets larger, more modern public or administrative spaces be created in the district.

20242024S09199.objet_clair: Studies for ecological construction of a new cultural centre in the 20th.
20242024S09199.quoi_concretement: Architects and engineers design a future cultural venue on rue des Rigoles using sustainable materials. The project bets on low environmental impact from design.
20242024S09199.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a new culture venue for residents while respecting the city's ecological commitments.

20242024T12895.objet_clair: Green-space creation and tree planting on Avenue de la Nation in the 13th.
20242024T12895.quoi_concretement: Landscape designers will convert part of the public space into a planted zone. Includes plant planting and floor fit-outs to better absorb rainwater.
20242024T12895.pourquoi_ca_compte: Fights city heat and makes the area more pleasant and breathable for residents.

20242024T05219.objet_clair: Ventilation-system modernisation at Saint-Didier School in the 16th.
20242024T05219.quoi_concretement: Technicians will replace or improve the school's ventilation installations. The aim is to ensure effective air renewal in classrooms and shared spaces.
20242024T05219.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures better indoor air quality for pupil and teacher health and concentration.

20242024T00464.objet_clair: Wooden-window replacement at Octave Gréard College in the 8th.
20242024T00464.quoi_concretement: Carpenters will change old outer windows and doors with new wooden models. The works improve the school's thermal and acoustic insulation.
20242024T00464.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts the college's energy use and improves pupil comfort, summer and winter.

20242024S07237.objet_clair: Gardening and planting workshops for schools in the 11th and 12th districts.
20242024S07237.quoi_concretement: A specialist association will run educational sessions where pupils take part directly in plant planting at their school. Children learn to grow and respect nature.
20242024S07237.pourquoi_ca_compte: Raises young Parisians' awareness of ecology and biodiversity through hands-on, fun activities.

20242024F11930.objet_clair: Newspaper and magazine purchases (French and foreign) for City services.
20242024F11930.quoi_concretement: This contract manages paper and digital press subscriptions for libraries or municipal services. Covers a wide selection of news and specialist titles.

20242024S12488.objet_clair: Conversion of Paris day-care yards into Oasis cool islands.
20242024S12488.quoi_concretement: SPL Pariseine manages the works to green several day-care yards. The aim is to replace tarmac with natural materials and plants to better cope with heat.
20242024S12488.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides young children cooler, more pleasant outdoor spaces during heatwaves.

20242024S07330.objet_clair: Sports activities and supervision in the 14th district.
20242024S07330.quoi_concretement: The Proximsport association sets up sports sessions and prevention activities for residents. These activities run at sports centres or area public spaces.
20242024S07330.pourquoi_ca_compte: Encourages social ties and resident health through eased access to local sport.

20242024T11266.objet_clair: Redesign and greening works on streets of the 10th district.
20242024T11266.quoi_concretement: Eurovia carries out roadway works to plant trees and create green spaces. The project cuts car space in favour of more natural pedestrian zones.
20242024T11266.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves the 10th-district residents' setting and fights pollution and city heat.

20242024T06453.objet_clair: Window and door replacement in 5th-district public buildings.

20242024T06453.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves user thermal comfort and cuts the energy bill of City buildings.

20242024T02672.objet_clair: Ventilation-system modernisation at Lobineau and Félibien day-cares.
20242024T02672.quoi_concretement: The company installs new air-treatment equipment at two 6th-district day-cares. The works renew indoor air more effectively and regulate temperature.
20242024T02672.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures better air quality and a healthier setting for babies and staff.

20242024S06763.objet_clair: Restoration and conservation of drawings and prints owned by the City of Paris.
20242024S06763.quoi_concretement: Specialists restore paper artworks (drawings, prints, posters) from the municipal collections. They clean, repair and protect these documents to prevent their degradation.
20242024S06763.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the capital's historic and artistic heritage for future generations.

20242024S03534.objet_clair: Curtain and drape cleaning at municipal services.
20242024S03534.quoi_concretement: A laundry company unhooks, washes and reinstalls curtains in various City offices and buildings. Covers regular maintenance of furnishing textiles.

20232023S04172.objet_clair: Studies and tests with users of the City's digital services.
20232023S04172.quoi_concretement: Experts question Parisians and municipal staff to test websites or mobile apps. The aim is to verify these tools are easy to use before deployment.
20232023S04172.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures online administrative procedures are simple and accessible to all citizens.

20242024F03292.quoi_concretement: The City rents lifting equipment to move heavy loads in its warehouses or works sites. Manuloc supplies the equipment needed for municipal-staff logistics operations.

20242024F12127.objet_clair: Recycled-tyre purchases for municipal cars and vans.

20242024F12127.pourquoi_ca_compte: This choice favours recycling and cuts the ecological footprint of City service travel.

20242024S00360.objet_clair: Safety inspections of streetlights and traffic signals.
20242024S00360.quoi_concretement: Experts check the proper condition of public-lighting and traffic-signal electrical installations. They ensure no breakdown or electrical-accident risk on Paris streets.
20242024S00360.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures passer-by safety and proper lighting operation to travel confidently at night.

20242024F06286.objet_clair: Children's-book purchases for libraries in the 7th, 8th, 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th districts.

20242024F06286.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets young Parisians in these areas access varied, free literary new releases near home.

20242024F06247.objet_clair: Children's-book purchases for all Paris libraries.
20242024F06247.quoi_concretement: This contract buys youth books to build a shared common collection across all City libraries. Renews stocks of books available for lending.
20242024F06247.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures rich, modern, renewed reading provision for all children regardless of area.

20242024S04784.objet_clair: Training of municipal staff in web and print communications.
20242024S04784.quoi_concretement: City employees learn to create content for the internet or printed brochures. The training covers digital-tool use and information-distribution techniques.

20242024F06277.objet_clair: Children's-book purchases for libraries in the 5th, 6th, 13th and 14th districts.
20242024F06277.quoi_concretement: Partner booksellers deliver books for children and young adults to south-Paris libraries. Includes fiction, documentaries and comics for all ages.
20242024F06277.pourquoi_ca_compte: Families in these districts enjoy quality, regularly updated book collections.

20242024S02302.objet_clair: Training of City health staff to become senior health officers.
20242024S02302.quoi_concretement: City of Paris care staff follow specific preparation to obtain the senior-health-officer diploma. The training lets them progress to leadership and management posts in medical services.

20242024S04785.quoi_concretement: Experts train City of Paris staff in visual-communications tools, web design and management techniques. These sessions modernise internal skills for printed and digital materials.

20242024S03875.objet_clair: Restoration and conservation of historic textiles and tapestries owned by the City.
20242024S03875.quoi_concretement: Specialists clean, repair and preserve old fabrics, rugs and tapestries from municipal collections. The aim is to halt their deterioration and let them be exhibited.

20242024S12029.objet_clair: Distribution of newspapers and information brochures in letterboxes.

20242024S13546.objet_clair: Insurance for City social and educational activities.
20242024S13546.quoi_concretement: This contract protects the City from risks linked to school trips, leisure centres and social actions. Covers accidents or damage caused at these activities.
20242024S13546.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the financial and legal security needed to maintain after-school and social activities.

20242024T03529.quoi_concretement: Workers refurbish roof or floor waterproofing, especially at the dining hall and schoolyards. The aim is to prevent water leaks and protect the building.
20242024T03529.pourquoi_ca_compte: These works ensure children and school-staff comfort and safety by preventing damp.

20242024S11069.objet_clair: Development and maintenance of the Paris Tennis booking app.

20242024S11069.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures a smooth, accessible booking service for all Paris tennis players.

20242024000027.objet_clair: Educational and cultural workshop organisation for Paris school children.
20242024000027.quoi_concretement: This programme offers themed activities (sciences, citizenship, digital) to primary-school classes. Leaders intervene to enrich children's educational journey during school time.
20242024000027.pourquoi_ca_compte: These activities provide free access to culture and innovative learning tools for children.

20242024S00817.objet_clair: Studies and works direction for the Val-de-Grâce gardens renovation.
20242024S00817.quoi_concretement: Architects and landscape designers design the restoration project for these historic 5th-district gardens. They then supervise the works to ensure heritage is respected.
20242024S00817.pourquoi_ca_compte: The project restores a historic green space and improves the area's setting.

20242024S02949.objet_clair: Studies for redesign of Place Denfert-Rochereau.
20242024S02949.quoi_concretement: Architects and landscape designers produce plans to transform Place Denfert-Rochereau. They work on traffic, greening and beautification of this major 14th-district space.

20242024T02726.objet_clair: Facade renovation and waterproofing of a public building.

20242024S10135.objet_clair: Live video broadcasting of Conseil de Paris sessions.

20242024T01921.objet_clair: Interior renovation of Foncin School in the 20th district.

20242024T09620.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better windows mean fewer draughts and better acoustic insulation for children's comfort.

20242024S07339.objet_clair: Free sports activities in the 18th district.

20242024S07339.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets young people and families access supervised sports leisure for free near home.

20242024000008.objet_clair: Holiday camps in Lozère for Paris college students.

20242024000003.objet_clair: Holiday-stay organisation for Paris college students.

20242024S03341.objet_clair: Maintenance of the occupational-health and prevention software for municipal staff.

20242024T12950.objet_clair: Wood interior-carpentry works for renovation of a public building.

20242024T04072.objet_clair: Heating and ventilation modernisation at the rue de la Folie Regnault day-care.

20242024T04072.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures a healthy, comfortable setting for toddlers and early-childhood staff.

20242024F06281.objet_clair: Children's-book purchases for libraries in the 11th, 12th and 20th districts.

20242024S00353.pourquoi_ca_compte: Prevents physical issues for the professionals caring for children daily.

20242024S11822.objet_clair: Skills assessments for City of Paris employees.
20242024S11822.quoi_concretement: Experts support municipal staff to review their careers. They help them identify skills and prepare a possible career change.

20242024S00352.objet_clair: Sport-and-health sessions for Paris day-care staff.
20242024S00352.quoi_concretement: Sports coaches work with early-childhood staff. The aim is to prevent work-related physical pain and improve workplace well-being.
20242024S00352.pourquoi_ca_compte: Healthier staff means better welcome and greater stability at day-cares.

20242024F00249.objet_clair: World-music and percussion-instrument purchases for Paris facilities.

20242024T02805.objet_clair: Heating and ventilation modernisation at the rue de la Providence school.

20242024T11172.objet_clair: Greening of rue du Buisson Saint-Louis in the 10th district.

20242024T09396.objet_clair: Ventilation-system modernisation at the rue Henri Ribière day-care.

20242024T04366.pourquoi_ca_compte: These works maintain ideal temperature and purified air for pupils year-round.

20242024T05591.objet_clair: Wooden-window and door replacement in a Paris school.

20242024T05591.pourquoi_ca_compte: Modern windows better protect children from cold and street noise.

20242024S07314.objet_clair: Sports activities for young people in the 8th, 9th and 10th districts.

20242024T04108.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures well-heated classrooms in winter and better-ventilated rooms for young children's health.

20242024S09979.objet_clair: River transport of materials on Canal Saint-Martin.
20242024S09979.quoi_concretement: Use of the waterway to transport works or maintenance materials along the canal. This solution replaces lorry transport in Paris streets.
20242024S09979.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts road traffic, noise and pollution by favouring greener river transport.

20242024S00784.objet_clair: Durable information-panel installation at 42 Paris sports sites.
20242024S00784.quoi_concretement: Manufacture and installation of permanent signage at gymnasiums or stadiums following the Olympic Games. These panels help users orient themselves in City facilities.
20242024S00784.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves welcome and orientation of Paris athletes in the renovated municipal infrastructure.

20232023S10900.objet_clair: Maintenance of City of Paris high-pressure cleaners.
20232023S10900.quoi_concretement: Technical maintenance of machines used by cleanliness services to clean floors and walls. This contract covers heavy cleaning equipment.
20232023S10900.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures equipment stays operational to keep streets and public spaces clean.

20242024F11915.objet_clair: Salt purchase for street snow-clearing in winter.
20242024F11915.quoi_concretement: Delivery of large quantities of bulk-stored salt and grit. These stocks are used by municipal services as soon as temperatures drop.
20242024F11915.pourquoi_ca_compte: Prevents accidents and falls by making roadways and pavements less slippery in case of frost or snow.

20232023S11911.objet_clair: Fire-safety training for City of Paris staff.
20232023S11911.quoi_concretement: Specialist trainers teach municipal employees first-aid actions and how to use extinguishers. These sessions prepare staff to react effectively in case of fire in public buildings.
20232023S11911.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures user and staff safety in town halls, schools and other venues welcoming the public.

20242024S07197.objet_clair: Health diagnostic and tree expertise of the capital's trees.
20242024S07197.quoi_concretement: Specialists examine Paris trees' health to detect diseases or weaknesses. They advise the City on care to provide or the need to fell some that have become dangerous.
20242024S07197.pourquoi_ca_compte: Prevents branch falls during storms and preserves the city's green heritage.

20242024F06233.objet_clair: Self-watering pot and tub purchases for city plants.
20242024F06233.quoi_concretement: The City buys horticultural containers fitted with bottom-up automatic watering. These pots keep plants hydrated longer while saving water.
20242024F06233.pourquoi_ca_compte: Optimises urban green-space irrigation and cuts water waste.

20242024S04521.objet_clair: Maintenance of the software used for civil-registry management.
20242024S04521.quoi_concretement: Technicians ensure proper running and updates of the Cityweb software. It's the IT tool that lets town-hall staff register births, marriages and deaths.
20242024S04521.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures continuity of public service for obtaining your official documents and ID papers.

20242024S00041.objet_clair: Creation and delivery of the City of Paris fireworks.
20242024S00041.quoi_concretement: A specialist company designs the staging, installs the explosives and runs the firing of the pyrotechnic show. Includes site safety and artistic coordination of the event.
20242024S00041.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a free, large-scale show to Parisians and tourists at national celebrations.

20242024T02889.objet_clair: New judo room fit-out in the 18th district.
20242024T02889.quoi_concretement: Construction and interior fit-out works are carried out to create a dojo at 11 rue du Pré. The project converts an existing space into a sports room equipped with tatami mats for local clubs.
20242024T02889.pourquoi_ca_compte: Develops local sports provision and lets area residents practise martial arts.

20242024T04839.objet_clair: Heating and ventilation works for three 15th-district public facilities.
20242024T04839.quoi_concretement: Workers operate on the air-conditioning and heating systems of the Cévennes Gymnasium, an animation centre and the Gutenberg Library. The aim is to improve user thermal comfort.
20242024T04839.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures pleasant temperature and good air quality at the area's sports and culture venues.

20242024T04499.objet_clair: Demolition and major works for a fit-out on Avenue d'Italie.
20242024T04499.quoi_concretement: This site covers the first renovation phase of a public building at 93 avenue d'Italie. Workers install barriers, demolish old structures and consolidate load-bearing walls.

20242024S00083.objet_clair: Design of a Seine swimming site at Bercy.
20242024S00083.quoi_concretement: Architects and engineers will design the fit-outs needed for swimming in the Seine at Bercy (12th). They prepare plans and supervise future river-access works.
20242024S00083.pourquoi_ca_compte: Parisians will soon be able to swim outdoors in the Seine safely.

20242024T00228.objet_clair: Heating-system replacement of an office building on Boulevard Diderot.
20242024T00228.quoi_concretement: Technicians will replace the old heating installation with a more modern, greener system in an administrative building of the 12th district.
20242024T00228.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts energy use and the carbon footprint of City buildings.

20242024T00885.objet_clair: Roof structure and window renovation at Maison de Rousseau.
20242024T00885.quoi_concretement: Specialist craftspeople will restore the wooden structures and joinery of this 4th-district historic building to preserve its old architecture.
20242024T00885.pourquoi_ca_compte: Safeguards Paris's historic heritage for future generations.

20242024F11833.objet_clair: Fair-trade cotton protective-clothing purchase for staff.
20242024F11833.quoi_concretement: The City orders grey work outfits for its technical staff. These clothes are made from fair-trade cotton and treated to be fire-resistant.
20242024F11833.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures municipal-staff safety while supporting responsible textile production.

20232023F11697.objet_clair: Organic-cotton polo purchase for City gardeners.
20232023F11697.quoi_concretement: Supply of green polos for staff working in Paris parks and gardens. The fabric used meets organic-cotton and fair-trade standards.
20232023F11697.pourquoi_ca_compte: Equips city gardeners with environmentally friendly clothing.

20242024T04211.quoi_concretement: Workers will transform a schoolyard to make it more modern and pleasant. Includes new surfacing and improvement of the play space.
20242024T04211.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides children a cooler play space better suited to climate change.

20242024000019.objet_clair: School-trip organisation for Paris school children.
20242024000019.quoi_concretement: An association organises stays and educational activities for Paris primary-school classes over a four-year period.
20242024000019.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets all Paris children access varied educational activities outside school.

20242024000024.objet_clair: Artistic and cultural workshops for Paris pupils.
20242024000024.quoi_concretement: Speakers offer artistic-awakening workshops and themed visits to Paris classes to introduce children to art.
20242024000024.pourquoi_ca_compte: Encourages access to culture from an early age for all young Parisians.

20242024T12949.objet_clair: Bedroom renovation at the Thomas Mann boarding school.
20242024T12949.quoi_concretement: Full renovation works will be carried out in the bedrooms of this 13th-district boarding school. The company handles all trades to modernise the venue and improve resident comfort.
20242024T12949.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves the housing and living conditions of students and pupils boarding on site.

20242024T12998.objet_clair: Cabin and changing-room installation for swimming at Quai de Grenelle.
20242024T12998.quoi_concretement: Shipping containers will be converted and fitted out at the Quai de Grenelle swimming site. They will serve as changing rooms, toilets and technical premises to welcome swimmers.
20242024T12998.pourquoi_ca_compte: Lets Parisians enjoy new safe, equipped swimming venues by the Seine.

20242024F01206.objet_clair: Modernisation of City IT and network equipment.
20242024F01206.quoi_concretement: The company supplies and installs equipment to reinforce IT networks and data security. Covers servers and connections used by municipal services.

20242024T04830.objet_clair: Heating and ventilation modernisation at the rue Cavé school.
20242024T04830.quoi_concretement: Works will be carried out at this 18th-district school to replace the heating system and improve classroom ventilation. The aim is to ensure stable temperature and healthier air.
20242024T04830.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures better thermal comfort and air quality for children and teachers.

20242024S07311.objet_clair: Free sports-activity organisation in several central districts.
20242024S07311.quoi_concretement: An association organises sports sessions for young people in the 5th, 6th, 7th and 11th districts. These activities encourage social mix and prevent isolation through supervised sports practice.
20242024S07311.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides young people free access to local sports leisure during their free time.

20242024S07332.objet_clair: Sports activities for young people in the 15th district.
20242024S07332.quoi_concretement: Sports educators will run discovery activities at 15th-district sports centres. The programme lets children and teenagers practise different sports for free.
20242024S07332.pourquoi_ca_compte: Encourages sports practice and social integration for area young people.

20242024S00879.objet_clair: Support for Child Welfare and family services in central Paris.
20242024S00879.quoi_concretement: An association provides technical support to professionals supporting families and young children. Covers social and child-protection facilities in seven central districts.
20242024S00879.pourquoi_ca_compte: Reinforces support for vulnerable families and the protection of Paris young children.

20242024S01472.objet_clair: Recycling and secure destruction of old IT equipment.
20242024S01472.quoi_concretement: The company collects old computers, screens and phones from the City of Paris. It destroys confidential data and ecologically recycles electronic components.
20242024S01472.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts the city's digital-waste environmental impact while protecting sensitive data.

20242024F06235.objet_clair: Tub and planter purchases for plants in Paris streets.
20242024F06235.quoi_concretement: The city buys containers to install flowers and shrubs on pavements and squares. The company delivers these tubs that let public space be greened where direct ground planting isn't possible.
20242024F06235.pourquoi_ca_compte: Brings more nature and cool air to the capital's most-built-up areas.

20242024S11870.objet_clair: Waste disposal and recycling at the Bonneuil maintenance centre.
20242024S11870.quoi_concretement: The company collects material remains and waste from city maintenance activities. These rejects are transported from the Bonneuil centre to be sorted and turned into new materials.
20242024S11870.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures ecological, responsible management of waste produced by municipal technical services.

20242024F03405.quoi_concretement: The city's IT department equips itself with new equipment to back up and manage digital data. This equipment ensures proper running of online services and software used by the town hall.

20242024T04881.objet_clair: Planted, cooler schoolyard fit-out at Godefroy School.
20242024T04881.quoi_concretement: The works replace the schoolyard tarmac with natural materials and plant trees. The aim is to create a more pleasant space that stays cool during heatwaves.
20242024T04881.pourquoi_ca_compte: Children enjoy a healthier break space better suited to heatwaves.
